characters.name: Abuelita
characters.description: AbuelitaPortrayed byMiriam ColonCharacter informationFull nameMrs. SalamancaDate of birthc. 1924Age79("Mijo")FateStatusUnknown(presumed deceased)Social lifeResidenceAbuelita's HouseFamilyHector Salamanca[1](son)Unnamed sonsTuco Salamanca(grandson)Lalo Salamanca(grandson)Marco and Leonel Salamanca(grandsons)Unnamed grandchildJoaquin Salamanca(great-grandson)Unnamed granddaughterGonzo(grandson-in-law)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"Uno""Mijo"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (2)/Videos (2)"Abuelita"(diminutive fromAbuela, spanish forgrandma) is the mother ofHector Salamanca, as well as the grandmother ofTuco,Lalo,Marco and Leonel Salamancaand the great-grandmother ofJoaquin Salamanca. She is one of the few members ofthe Salamanca familyto not be affiliated withthe Cartel. Abuelita is driving her car home when she accidentally runs overCalas his twin brother,Lars Lindholm, is filming him performing skate maneuvers on the street; unbeknown to her, this is actually part of a scam meant to target one ofJimmy McGill's intended clients,Betsy Kettleman. Frightened by the situation, she drives off from the scene and the twins follow her home. As she parks the car in front of the garage, the twins threaten her, accusing her of breaking Cal's leg and that they want her to do something about the situation. Abuelita clearly doesn't speak too much English, she invites the twins inside her home so they can find a solution("Uno"). As they get inside the house, they are received by Abuelita's grandson, Tuco. She tries to explain to Tuco the situation, but the twins continue to threaten to call the police and that they need money; Lars even calls Abuelita a "biznatch", which infuriates Tuco. He then calms down his grandmother and convinces her to go to her room and watch her soap opera as he deals with the twins. Later on, after hearing strange noises, Abuelita leaves her room and spots Tuco cleaning blood from the carpet, which he convinces her that it's only salsa that he spilled and she goes back to watching her soap opera("Mijo").

Later on, after hearing strange noises, Abuelita leaves her room and spots Tuco cleaning blood from the carpet, which he convinces her that it's only salsa that he spilled and she goes back to watching her soap opera("Mijo").

characters.name: Everett Acker
characters.description: Everett AckerPortrayed byBarry CorbinCharacter informationDate of birthc.1920s(presumably)Age80s(presumably)FateStatusAliveSocial lifeResidenceAcker ResidenceAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"The Guy For This""Dedicado a Max"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (6)/Videos (3) Everett Ackeris a homeowner in a land dispute withMesa Verde. He later becomes a client ofSaul Goodman. Mr. Acker is first seen in Season 5, where he is in the middle of a land dispute with Mesa Verde. He has lived on the plot of land in dispute for 30 years as of 2004, respectively since 1974. The source of the dispute lies in the fact that the land is leased, with Mesa Verde having acquired the land to build a call center. Mr. Acker becomes the last holdout, as his land is the only plot that had not yet been razed. Kim Wexler points out that although his lease had "another 70 years left" on the terms, the agreed upon terms held that the agreement could be bought out at any time, with the owner receiving fair market value plus $5,000, something Kim admits "sounded like a lot of money in 1974" but doesn't sound particularly compensatory in the present circumstances.("The Guy For This")

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: AdamPortrayed byJohn LawlorFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationLocksmithAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"Box Cutter""Box Cutter"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (2)Adamis a locksmith based inAlbuquerque,New Mexico. Adam was called out toThe BeachcomberbySkyler Whiteto open her husbandWalter White's locked apartment door. He asked her if she had any proof of residency, but she was unable to come up with any. Saying that there was nothing he could do without it, Skyler then lied about not having her medication. Skyler, holding her daughterHolly, handed her to Adam while she faked a panic attack. An exasperated Adam unlocked the door and let them both in. Skyler then asked him about the bill, but he assured that his office will mail it to her, and then quickly left.("Box Cutter")

characters.name: Adrian
characters.description: 20032004AdrianPortrayed byHans ObmaFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationConstruction workerRelationshipsWerner Ziegler(former boss)Casper(former colleague)Kai(former colleague)Renke(former colleague)Sebastian(former colleague)Udo(former colleague)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"Piñata""Magic Man"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (10)Adrianis a construction worker from Vienna, Austria and a part ofWerner Ziegler's team for the construction of thesuperlab. Adrian and the rest of the team arrive at the warehouse which has been converted into a living space for the duration of the construction of the superlab. As the team disperse to visit the venue, Adrian goes to the bar withCasper.("Piñata") After only half the work was finished onGustavo Fring'ssuperlab, the production was put to a halt courtesy of Ziegler's absence. He and the rest of the construction were paid in full and were all lied to about Ziegler being sent home. However, they knew the truth.("Magic Man")

characters.name: Alan
characters.description: AlanPortrayed byUnseen characterFateStatusDeceasedDate of deathc. 1995Social lifeOccupationCamping supply store ownerNavy serviceman (Formerly)FamilyAnita(wife)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (1)Alanis the late husband ofAnita. Navy serviceman (Formerly) Alan was a hiking enthusiast and sometime after departing from the Navy, he and his wife Anita opened a camping supply store in which Anita managed the mail orders. In 1995, Alan went on a hiking trip to theGila National Forestbut never returned. Anita knows Alan is dead because they found their car, but they never found him, and by 2003 Alan still hadn't been found.("Expenses")

characters.name: Robert Alley
characters.description: Robert AlleyPortrayed byQuinn VanAntwerpCharacter informationFull nameRobert AlleyFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationAttorneyAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"Chicanery""Off Brand"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (3)Robert Alleyis an attorney who was representing the State Bar atJames McGill's bar disciplinary hearing. Robert Alley representing the State Bar againstJimmyat his bar hearing. He successively interviews the various witnesses, includingHowardandChuck, and tries to prove to the court Jimmy's guilt so that he is disbarred. He gets that Jimmy's confession tape is played before the committee presiding over the case. When Jimmy's little trick is revealed, Alley argues that Chuck's mental illness is a non-issue, comparing him to a schizophrenic. However, he is interrupted by Chuck who self-destructs in court, ruining the outcome of the trial.("Chicanery",  "Off Brand")

characters.name: Alma Neff
characters.description: Alma NeffPortrayed byUncredited actressFateStatusDeceasedSocial lifeOccupationFounder ofNeff copiersFamilyOllie(husband)Mr. Neff(nephew)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (1)Alma Neffis the founder ofNeff Copiersand the aunt ofMr. Neff. Around 1953 Alma and her husband Ollie started a successful copier business. In the early days of their business, they had a repairman named Frank Corker. Alma also liked collecting Hummel figurines. Her collection is displayed inMr. Neff's office. While at a job interview forNeff Copiers,Jimmyis shown a picture of Alma byHenry. Jimmy notices Alma's collection of Hummel figurines and tells Henry he knewa ladywho also liked collecting Hummel figurines.("Breathe")

characters.name: Todd Alquist
characters.description: Main20092010Todd AlquistPortrayed byJesse PlemonsCharacter informationAliasesToddy("Felina")Ricky Hitler("Buyout")Date of birthc. 1987Age22("Hazard Pay")23("Felina")FateStatusDeceasedDate of deathSeptember 7, 2010Cause of deathGarroted with a metal chain byJesse PinkmanSocial lifeOccupationFumigator forVamonos Pest(former)Lab assistant forWalter White(former)Enforcer/Meth Cook forJack WelkerResidenceTodd's ApartmentJack Welker's CompoundFamilyJack Welker(uncle)Unnamed mother/auntRelationshipsIra(former employer)Walter White(senior meth cook)Lydia Rodarte-Quayle(employer & one-sided love interest on Todd's side)Kenny(friend)Frankie(friend)Matt(friend)Lester(friend)Fernando(former colleague)Sandor(former colleague)Jesse Pinkman(slave/friend on Todd’s side)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"Hazard Pay""Felina"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✔YesImages (76)/Videos (5) Todd Alquistis amethamphetaminecook and former exterminator forVamonos Pest, and the nephew ofJack Welker. He worked forWalter White,Mike Ehrmantraut, andJesse Pinkmanintheir meth manufacturing business. Todd also operated for hisuncle Jack Welker'sgangand their allyLydia Rodarte-Quayle, whom Todd has a crush on. When Jesse and Mike decided to quit the meth business, Walt brought Todd on as his new assistant. After Walt kills Mike, Todd truly earned his place at Walt's right hand when he helped dispose of Mike's body and introduced Walt to his prison-connected uncle,Jack Welker. Walt hired Jack andhis gangto execute all of the imprisoned former members ofGus' Drug Empire, getting rid of any loose ends that might lead theDEAback to Walt. After Jack and his gang killHank SchraderandSteven Gomez, Todd recommends keeping Jesse alive so he can cook meth for them, and Jack agrees. Todd and his gang take Jesse back to their compound, where he remained as their slave cook for several months. When Jesse attempted to escape, Todd punished him by executing his former girlfriendAndrea Cantillo.

When Jesse and Mike decided to quit the meth business, Walt brought Todd on as his new assistant. Walt hired Jack andhis gangto execute all of the imprisoned former members ofGus' Drug Empire, getting rid of any loose ends that might lead theDEAback to Walt. After Jack and his gang killHank SchraderandSteven Gomez, Todd recommends keeping Jesse alive so he can cook meth for them, and Jack agrees. characters.description: AlvarezPortrayed byUnseen characterFateStatusUnknownSocial lifeOccupationMember of theLos Odios CartelResidencePeruAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (1)Alvarezis a member of theLos Odios Cartelbased in Peru. Juan BolsainterrogatedNacho Vargaabout who was responsible for the assassination attempt onLalo Salamanca. Aiming to protectGustavo Fring, Nacho lies to Bolsa, telling that he had been under Alvarez' payroll for years and that he orchestrated the attempt on Lalo.("Rock and Hard Place").

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: AmberPortrayed byKaterina TannenbaumFateStatusAliveSocial lifeResidenceNacho's House(former)RelationshipsNacho Varga(boyfriend)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"Coushatta""Carrot and Stick"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (1)Amberis one ofNacho's junkie girlfriends. While Amber andNikkiare slumped on the couch watching TV, they seeNachocominghome. They straighten up to look more active, greet him and ask him if he wants them to make dinner for him. Nacho doesn't answer and throws a bag of drugs at each of them. She thanks him and asks him if he wants to smoke it with them.("Coushatta") Shortly beforeGus' team kidnaps Nacho, Amber is seen sleeping on the couch in the living room whileJosleeps naked in the same bed as Nacho.("50% Off")

characters.name: Antoinette Antonio
characters.description: Antoinette AntonioPortrayed byHerselfFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationNews ReporterAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"Buyout""Gliding Over All"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (1) Antoinette Antoniois a news anchor on the KOB channel. She reports the disappearance ofDrew Sharpon TV after his death.("Buyout")

characters.name: Antonio
characters.description: AntonioPortrayed byParker SistyFateStatusAliveSocial lifeRelationshipsSaul Goodman(former attorney)Unnamed WomanAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"Green Light""Green Light"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (1)Antoniowas a client ofSaul Goodman's. Antonio and a woman were in Saul's office discussing a fake injury Antonio had suffered during theWayfarer 515crash. Neither Antonio or the woman were actually injured, but were merely in the debris path. Antonio wore a neck brace to simulate injury, but said that it was too tight and hard to breathe. Saul took of the brace, and reminded Antonio that he was a "victim of a terrible accident." before putting on a looser brace. At that moment,Mike Ehrmantrautwalked in, and Saul escorted Antonio and the woman out of his office, saying to the woman in Spanish about their cashier's check transaction. He then shouted after them that he was building a class action suit for Wayfarer, saying that he'd take victims' families, along with anyone who suffered "emotionally".

characters.name: April
characters.description: AprilPortrayed byGabriela Alicia OrtegaFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationProstituteAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✔YesImages (1)Aprilis a prostitute that was hired byNeiland his associates. April, along withWandaandCandy, is brought toKandy Welding Co.byClarenceand hired by Neil and his associates to celebrate the successful heist ofTodd Alquist's money. After a few hours, the prostitutes leave, finally allowing Jesse to confront Neil and his crew.

characters.name: Lindsay Arch
characters.description: Lindsay ArchPortrayed byMolly HaganFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationJudgeAppearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"Sunk Costs""Sunk Costs"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (2)Lindsay Archis a judge. Jimmyis presented to judge Lindsay Arch for his arraignment. She tells Jimmy all the facts that are alleged against him and announces the maximum sentences associated. Although the judge strongly discourages him from representing himself, Jimmy refusesKim's help. Benevolent, the judge agrees that Jimmy plead not guilty and accepts that he will be released on a $2,500 bond.("Sunk Costs")

characters.name: Hugo Archilleya
characters.description: Hugo ArchilleyaPortrayed byPierre BarreraFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationJanitor,J. P. Wynne High School(former)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"Crazy Handful of Nothin'""Crazy Handful of Nothin'"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (4)Hugo Archilleyais a former custodian and janitor atJ. P. Wynne High School, which is whereWalter Whitetaught before becoming a drug kingpin. A friendly sort of person, he cleaned up after Walter and offered him some chewing gum when he found Walt in the school bathroom, vomiting from the side-effects of his chemotherapy. Hugo was the custodian and janitor ofJ. P. Wynne High School. Because of the access his custodial duties afforded him, Hugo was one of the initial suspects in the theft of the chemicals and glassware that Walter stole from the school's chemistry stockroom to equip he andJesse Pinkman'sfirst lab.Hank Schradercame to the school to follow up after a respirator with the school's name was found at one of Walt and Jesse's desert cook sites. Hank checked the lab's inventory, and found that a large amount of equipment was missing.

characters.name: Max Arciniega
characters.description: Maximino ArciniegaPortrayed byJames MartinezCharacter informationFull nameMaximino ArciniegaAliasesMaxDate of birthc. 1958Age31("Hermanos")FateStatusDeceasedDate of deathc. 1989Cause of deathShot in the head byHector Salamancaon the orders ofDon EladioSocial lifeOccupationCo-Founder ofLos Pollos HermanosRelationshipsGustavo Fring(former business partner/romantic partner)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"Hermanos""Hermanos"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (9) Maximino "Max" Arciniegawas the business  partner ofGustavo Fringand co-founder of theLos Pollos Hermanosfranchise. He held advanced degrees in biochemistry and chemical engineering. Max's education was financed by Gus after Gus rescued him from the slums ofSantiago. After attempting to establish a partnership withthe Cartel, Max was murdered byHector Salamancaon the orders ofDon Eladioas punishment for Gustavo's disrespectful actions of manipulating Eladio into a meeting by selling drugs to his men without consent.

After attempting to establish a partnership withthe Cartel, Max was murdered byHector Salamancaon the orders ofDon Eladioas punishment for Gustavo's disrespectful actions of manipulating Eladio into a meeting by selling drugs to his men without consent.

characters.name: Arlo
characters.description: ArloPortrayed bySpenser GraneseFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationDrug dealerRelationshipsMouse(partner)Krazy-8(employer)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast————Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast"Magic Man""50% Off"Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (3)Arlois a drug dealer working forKrazy-8andThe Cartel. When two tweakers arrive to buy cocaine, Arlo collects the money from the sidewalk before relaying toMousethe number of packets to send. WhenLalospeeds up to theapartment, Arlo runs up to him to get his attention and only backs down when he seesNachohas come along as well. Arlo inadvertently follows Lalo and Nacho inside and as Lalo inspects the cocaine, he reminds Arlo that he shouldn't be there since he's carrying the money from the drug deals.("Magic Man") WhenStickyandRonwant to buy a large order of cocaine, the packets get stuck in the rain gutter and Arlo is present whenKrazy-8comes to fix the problem. When the police arrive at the stash house, Arlo, Sticky, and Ron are forced to flee while Krazy-8 is arrested. When Lalo arrives to watch from a distance as the apartment is raided, Arlo and Mouse have to break the news to him that almost a full load was left behind.("50% Off")

characters.name: Arms Dealer
characters.description: Arms DealerPortrayed byNate MooneyFateStatusAliveSocial lifeOccupationTruck driver,Bronner FreightArms dealerRelationshipsLeonel and Marco Salamanca(former clients)Appearances in Breaking BadFirstLast"One Minute""One Minute"Appearances in Better Call SaulFirstLast————Appearance in El Camino✘NoImages (2) TheArms Dealeris a trucker and arms dealer, who sold body armor tothe Cousins. The Arms Dealer meets withLeonel and Marco Salamancain the a remote and empty parking lot where he reveals the armaments and supplies in his trailer. He tries to sell them hollow-point pistol rounds — nicknamed "Black Death" — giving Marco one as a sample. However, they only want ballistic vests, so he presents two.
